creator: hannes@mehnert.org
text:
Created attachment 255170
patch for devel/ocaml-opam to update to 2.3.0

Dear Madam or Sir,

please find attached an update of devel/ocaml-opam to its just released version 2.3.0. portlint and a poudriere build were successful.

The changes are at https://github.com/ocaml/opam/blob/2.3.0/CHANGES#L6-L238
